ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department of the student */,
  "seniority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seniority level of the student */,
  "texting_habit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the texting habit of the student */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of days the student attended classes */,
  "questions_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of asking questions in class */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained by the student in tests */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the final grade of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advisor of the student */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the student's enrollment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the student's enrollment */,
  "current_semester" INTEGER /* Current semester of the student */,
  "current_year" INTEGER /* Current year of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_texting_habit_id FOREIGN KEY ("texting_habit_id") REFERENCES texting_habits ("texting_habit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_questions_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("questions_frequency_id") REFERENCES questions_frequencies ("questions_frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_seniority_id FOREIGN KEY ("seniority_id") REFERENCES seniority_levels ("seniority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department of the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester of the enrollment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment */,
  "assignment_scores" REAL /* Assignment scores for the course */,
  "midterm_score" REAL /* Midterm score for the course */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_performance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seniority_levels" (
  "seniority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seniority level */,
  "seniority_name" TEXT /* Name of the seniority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seniority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "texting_habits" (
  "texting_habit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each texting habit */,
  "texting_habit_name" TEXT /* Name of the texting habit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("texting_habit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions_frequencies" (
  "questions_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "questions_frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("questions_frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student assigned the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
